title: Rockingham Forge BK-WD/R Acrylic Round Knife Block
features: THE BEST knife block, so you can store your knives safely, comfortably and all together. Enough space for up to 5 knives. The block doesn’t contain any knives on purchase
HIGH QUALITY - These knife blocks are made of high-quality acrylic, an elegant design that will look great in your kitchen
STURDY - Compressed fibre insert with brush features holds your knives in place
YOU HAVE THE CHOICE - The assortment contains 3 different colours with enough space for your favourite knives of any brand
DISHWASHER SAFE - The fibre insert can be removed to clean in the dishwasher meaning less hassle for you
description: Bring peace and order to your kitchen with our range of durable and affordable knife blocks, helping to create space on your surface. Store everything safely together so you always know where your favourite knives are. The knife blocks with fibre insert are available in three different colours, so we are convinced that there is something for every taste and every occasion in the range. Safety information: Please note that knives are extremely sharp. Handle with care and keep away from children. SET INCLUDES: 1 x KNIFE BLOCK WITH FIBER INSERT. The knife block product contains no knives. The knives must be bought separately. Founded in 1945, The award-winning Grunwerg family business produces high quality household goods and catering products specializing in high quality steel. The company is headed by the Grunwerg family, which is located in the steel town of Sheffield. The guaranteed high-quality Grunwerg product range remains the first choice among professionals and renowned chefs in the food industry.
